scripts.dev: echo "Run pnpm dev:server and pnpm dev:web in separate terminals, or use ./start-dev.sh / start-dev.bat"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter yidhras-server build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter yidhras-server lint && pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter yidhras-server typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
